verses.1: God is our refuge and strength,
verses.2: Therefore we won’t be afraid, though the earth changes,
verses.3: though its waters roar and are troubled,
verses.4: There is a river, the streams of which make the city of God glad,
verses.5: God is within her. She shall not be moved.
verses.6: The nations raged. The kingdoms were moved.
verses.7: The LORD of Armies is with us.
verses.9: He makes wars cease to the end of the earth.
verses.10: “Be still, and know that I am God.
verses.11: The LORD of Armies is with us.
